results.rendered_html:
bhand cl. 1. Ā. ( Dhātup. ii, 11 ) bhandate, to be greeted with praise, receive applause,  RV.  ( L.  also = to be or make fortunate or excellent; to be or make glad; to shine; to honour or worship) :
Caus. bhandayati, to cause to prosper,  Dhātup. xxxii, 50 ;  Vop.

results.rendered_html:
√bhand , bhandate so v. a. arcati  NAIGH. 3,14 .  NIR. 5,2 .  DHĀTUP. 2,11  (kalyāṇe sukhe caḥ mutprītyoḥ śubhe  VOP. ). jauchzenden Zuruf —, Lob empfangen: ā bhandamāne upāke naktoṣāsā (sīdatām)  ṚV. 1,142,7 . 3,4,6 . vaiśvānaraḥ pratnathā nākamāruhaddivaspṛṣṭhaṃ bhandamānaḥ sumanmabhiḥ 2,12 . ā viveśa rodasī bhūrivarpasā purupriyo bhandate dhāmabhiḥ kaviḥ 3,4 . Angeblich auch so v. a. jvalati  NAIGH. 1,16 . bhandayati (kalyāṇe)  VOP. _in_ DHĀTUP. 32,50 .
— Vgl. bhadra.
